name: Banana Butter
recipeInstructions:
1. Thoroughly mash the bananas.
2. Measure and add 3 cups of mashed bananas to a large saucepan.
3. Add lemon juice, chopped cherries, and sugar; mix well.
4. Bring the mixture to a hard rolling boil, stirring constantly.
5. Boil hard for 1 minute.
6. Remove from heat and quickly stir in the liquid pectin.
7. Ladle into clean, hot jars.
8. Seal the jars.
Makes 8 or 9 half-pints.
